headings.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none text-white

glass_panel.base: bg-zinc-900/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-xl

kpi_card.wrapper: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden group
kpi_card.label: text-sm font-medium text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider

agent_node.active: w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border-2 border-primary bg-primary/20 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)] animate-pulse
agent_node.inactive: w-12 h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center border border-zinc-700 bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-500

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white font-medium py-2 px-4 rounded-lg shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white border border-zinc-700 font-medium py-2 px-4 rounded-lg transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-zinc-800/50 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white transition-colors py-2 px-4 rounded-lg

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50 focus:border-primary outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600

gradients.hero_glow: bg-gradient-to-tr from-primary/20 via-transparent to-transparent opacity-50 blur-3xl absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none
gradients.border_beam: absolute inset-0 rounded-xl border border-transparent [mask-image:linear-gradient(white,white)] before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-primary/50 before:to-transparent before:animate-border-beam

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SYSTEM: This is a Dashboard/OS. Do not create a marketing landing page. Focus on data density and clarity.
2. THEME: Force Dark Mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless strictly necessary. The aesthetic is 'Dark Tech'.

3. AGENTS: Visualizing the 'Multi-Agent' aspect is the USP. Create a dedicated visual area (e.g., a top bar or side panel) that shows which agent is currently 'thinking' or 'acting'. Use the agent colors defined above.
4. GRIDS: Use the 'Bento Grid' layout. Mix large summary cards with smaller metric tiles.
5. CHARTS: Use 'recharts' with custom dark tooltips (bg-zinc-900/90 backdrop-blur). Do not use default white tooltips.
6. FONTS: Install 'Chivo' and 'IBM Plex Sans' via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS import.
7. COMPONENTS: Heavily customize Shadcn components. Remove the default 'radius-0.5rem' look if it looks too generic. Go for sharper edges (radius-md or sm) for a more technical feel.
8. REPORTS: For the Report/Slide generation page, make it look like a 'Command Center' document generator, not a simple download button.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
